title: Bug in the generation of the simulation sources with some stateful cells
body:
### Version

Yosys 0.37+21 (git sha1 8649e3066, clang 10.0.0-4ubuntu1 -fPIC -Os)

### On which OS did this happen?

Linux

### Reproduction Steps

Hi there!
In some cases with stateful cells, cxxrtl.cpp generation fails.
[I created a dedicated repository](https://github.com/flaviens/cxxrtl-b3) to help you reproduce this issue.
I it simply that sensitivity to multiple signals is not implemented in CXXRTL?
Interestingly, in #4144 , there is also multiple sensitive signals but this error does not appear there when generating cxxrtl.cpp.

Thank you!
Flavien

### Expected Behavior

Successful cxxrtl.cpp generation

### Actual Behavior

```
3.3.9. Executing PROC_DFF pass (convert process syncs to FFs).
Creating register for signal `\wrapper_cxxrtl.\top_i.celloutsig_0z' using process `\wrapper_cxxrtl.$flatten\top_i.$proc$top.sv:9$1'.
ERROR: Multiple edge sensitive events found for this signal!
```
code_blocks:
3.3.9. Executing PROC_DFF pass (convert process syncs to FFs).
Creating register for signal `\wrapper_cxxrtl.\top_i.celloutsig_0z' using process `\wrapper_cxxrtl.$flatten\top_i.$proc$top.sv:9$1'.
ERROR: Multiple edge sensitive events found for this signal!
